paper_announcements.summary: Meta AI releases SAM 3.1, an update to SAM 3 that introduces object multiplexing to significantly improve video processing performance.
Introduces Intern-S1-Pro, a scientific multimodal foundation model at trillion scale, with accompanying paper and technical details.
Announces a framework for training robot policies using large-scale RL and diverse resets for contact-rich manipulation tasks.
Releases slime v0.2.4 focusing on profiling and observability, with rollout trace timeline viewer and real-time metrics reporting.
AI Eleuther community shares research on how subliminal prompting propagates across networks of interacting agents, raising safety concerns.

discussions.summary: Discussion about whether Gaussian splats should be considered 'AI' and the problems of using 'AI' to refer to such a heterogeneous collection of technologies.
François Chollet explains intelligence as a conversion ratio with an optimality bound, arguing against the idea of unbounded scalar intelligence like '10,000 IQ'.
Discussion about local models vs cloud models, emphasizing the importance of free, private inference rather than just performance comparisons.
Argues that intelligence may have an optimal 'shape' but quantitative differences can create qualitative rifts, using chimp vs human brain comparison.
Discussion on interpretability research, noting that sparse decompositions don't directly solve the problem of making AI systems understandable to humans.

announcements.summary: Woot offers Nintendo Switch 2 at $399 for physical or $439 for Mario Kart Bundle, available in both physical and digital versions.
Nous Research releases Hermes Agent v0.5.0 with new features and improvements for AI agent development.
PlayStation announces details about the Vandal Runner Shell in Marathon, highlighting its hit-and-run gameplay and movement abilities.
Crunchyroll announces NEEDY GIRL OVERDOSE coming to their platform in April, featuring OMGkawaiiAngel seeking fame.
University of Washington astronomers discover rare evidence of two planets colliding 11,000 light-years away, potentially aiding search for Earth-like worlds.

other.summary: User expresses being in love and feeling happy about it every day, sharing positive relationship feelings.
John Cena shares motivational thoughts about not worrying about one's ultimate ceiling for achievement as it might not be the best use of resources.
Bernie Sanders criticizes Elon Musk's low effective tax rate of 3.3%, calling for wealthy individuals and corporations to pay their fair share.
Hasan Piker shares personal update about flying back home for a family emergency and missing a Bernie rally, with observations about airport security.
McMansion Hell author complains about The New York Times repeatedly plagiarizing her work, expressing frustration about lack of recourse for writers.
